title: allantodia contermina
intro: Allantodia contermina, also known as the Chinese lip fern or conterminous lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allantodia contermina include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used in traditional Chinese medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
